headline: Cataract Surgery in KK Nagar, Chennai
subheadline: AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari offers painless, stitchless cataract surgery with premium IOL options.
metaDescription: Stitchless cataract surgery in KK Nagar, Chennai with Dr. Rajeswari. Premium IOL options, painless procedure. Call or book online.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Same Surgeon, Start to Finish
whyPatientsChoose.description: From evaluation through surgery and every follow-up, you're cared for by the same doctor.

symptoms: Glare or halos around lights at night

processSteps.title: Comprehensive Evaluation
processSteps.description: A detailed eye exam to confirm the cataract and assess your eye health.

processSteps.title: Honest Discussion
processSteps.description: We explain your results and IOL options -- no pressure to rush into surgery.

processSteps.title: The Procedure
processSteps.description: Stitchless, painless phacoemulsification, typically with same-day discharge.
